overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk from a covered underpass through a futuristic desert city. The player exits into bright sunlight, crosses a multi-lane road with pedestrians, and proceeds along a construction-lined sidewalk toward a towering glass skyscraper in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with linear fluorescent lighting

events.description: approaching the exit, bright natural sunlight becomes visible at the end of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the bright outdoor exit

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling with visible texture and linear light fixtures
long fluorescent tube lights mounted along the ceiling
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit concrete underpass with linear fluorescent lighting. The camera moves forward toward a bright exit, with the artificial lighting creating a stark contrast to the visible sunlight ahead. No pedestrians or vehicles are present in this enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with palm-lined streets and futuristic architecture

events.description: exits the covered underpass into bright open sunlight and desert city environment
crossing the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait
completing the street crossing and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and crossing a busy street with other pedestrians, navigating between vehicles

notable_agents.action: red futuristic six-wheeled truck driving past the crosswalk
pedestrian in light clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street against the blue sky
large red industrial structure with cylindrical tanks
rocky desert mountains visible in the background haze
dark smoke rising from structures in the distance
tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically from the dark underpass to a bright, sunlit urban intersection. The camera crosses a multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians, passing palm trees and a red industrial building. Vehicles including a large red truck drive past as the camera navigates the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with active construction zone and parked vehicles

events.description: passing extensive construction scaffolding and orange barriers on the left side
navigating around a parked damaged car near the construction fence

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past construction zones, observing the tall glass tower ahead

notable_agents.action: damaged silver futuristic car parked by the construction fencing

entered.detail: metal scaffolding and orange construction barriers lining the sidewalk
prominent futuristic skyscraper with blue glass facade visible in the distance
yellow construction cranes visible behind the scaffolding
concrete parking garage with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk bordered by construction scaffolding on the left, the camera moves past parked futuristic vehicles. The tall blue glass tower dominates the view ahead, while construction cranes and a multi-story parking structure define the urban landscape. The environment shows active development with barriers and equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban thoroughfare with overhead walkways and utility infrastructure

events.description: passing underneath an overhead pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
green sports car speeds past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk with the glass tower growing larger in view, passing under infrastructure

notable_agents.action: green sports car speeding past on the multi-lane street

entered.detail: enclosed walkway bridge spanning across the street between buildings
tall utility poles with crossbars and wires lining the street
tall dark building with vertical DROMOS signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the urban thoroughfare, passing under an overhead pedestrian bridge. The tall blue glass tower appears closer and more prominent. The DROMOS building becomes visible on the left, while utility poles and street infrastructure line the right. Traffic includes a speeding green sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching downtown core with towering skyscrapers creating urban canyon

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall DROMOS building facade and signage
passing by dense urban infrastructure with overhead wires and towering structures

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the towering DROMOS building and continuing toward the city center

entered.detail: network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the dense downtown core, with the DROMOS building towering overhead on the left. The camera glances upward at the massive structure while continuing forward. Overhead power lines crisscross the sky, and the urban environment becomes more enclosed as the camera nears the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim, enclosed underpass into the sprawling, sun-drenched expanse of a futuristic desert city. It begins in a dimly lit concrete tunnel under linear fluorescent lights, moving steadily toward a bright exit that creates a stark contrast with the artificial interior. As the camera emerges into the blinding sunlight, the scene opens into a bustling urban intersection where the camera crosses a multi-lane street past palm trees, red industrial buildings, and passing traffic. The path then shifts toward a sidewalk lined with construction scaffolding and parked futuristic vehicles, with the view dominated by a towering blue glass skyscraper and distant cranes. Finally, the camera passes under a pedestrian bridge and glides past the massive DROMOS building, moving beneath a web of overhead power lines as the environment becomes increasingly dense and enclosed upon approaching the city center.
